items.title: Google Introduces Middleware Architecture for Genkit Applications
items.summaryShort: Google Introduces Middleware Architecture for Genkit Applications. Google has introduced Middleware for Genkit, its open-source framework for building AI-powered and agentic applications.

items.title: AWS MCP Server Reaches GA with Full API Coverage and IAM-Based Governance

items.title: Google Cloud Introduces Cross-Engine Iceberg Support in BigQuery
items.summaryShort: Google Cloud Introduces Cross-Engine Iceberg Support in BigQuery. At the Apache Iceberg Summit last month, Google announced new interoperability features for Apache Iceberg in BigQuery.

items.title: Uber Improves Restaurant Recommendations Using Real-Time Signals and Listwise Ranking
items.summaryShort: Uber Improves Restaurant Recommendations Using Real-Time Signals and Listwise Ranking. Uber updates its Uber Eats Home Feed recommendation system using near real-time user sequence features and a Generative Recommender model.

items.title: Xreal, Google's smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry
items.summaryShort: Xreal, Google's smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry. Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of XREAL, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.

items.title: 6 kitchen gadgets that make adulting feel easier
items.summaryShort: 6 kitchen gadgets that make adulting feel easier. From a robot stirring your soup to a bread machine that kneads your dough, here are 6 gadgets that may make you feel like you’ve won adulthood.
